symptom.value: Playwright CT test 'Dropdown — AC-4 dismiss › clicking outside the menu closes it' (Dropdown.ct.tsx:185) fails: after opening the menu and clicking the viewport corner, the menu stays visible; expect(menu).not.toBeVisible() times out (line 200). Downstream, :236 (AC-3 focus-return after click-outside) also fails because the dismissal never fires. CT suite 125/127, these 2 the sole failures.

affected_area.value: Dropdown component test harness: src/renderer/src/components/molecules/__tests__/Dropdown.ct.tsx (failing CT spec), Radix-based Dropdown.tsx (Radix DropdownMenu -> DismissableLayer), CT fixtures Dropdown.stories.tsx, and the shared Playwright CT mount (playwright/index.tsx). Cross-cutting candidate: any Radix overlay in CT (Modal).

repro_or_current.value: Run the CT suite (playwright test over CT specs). In Dropdown.ct.tsx:185: render the Dropdown fixture, open the menu (click trigger), assert menu visible, then page.mouse.click(vp.width - 10, vp.height - 10) to click the viewport corner, then expect(menu).not.toBeVisible() — times out at line 200. Fails identically with/without the tokens.css import; reproduces on a clean baseline (006 changes stashed).

desired.value: Both CT tests pass (Dropdown.ct.tsx:185 dismiss + :236 focus-return) via a correct fix at whatever layer the root cause lives; production click-outside dismissal behavior confirmed intact (not a loosened/weakened test).

unchanged_behavior.value: All currently-passing CT + unit tests stay green: Dropdown open-on-click, keyboard nav, item selection, Escape-to-close; Modal overlay/DismissableLayer behavior; the rest of the CT suite (125/127). No production Dropdown/Modal behavior change beyond fixing the click-outside dismissal.

intake_classifications.statement: Dropdown CT test for click-outside dismissal fails: after opening the menu and clicking the viewport corner, the menu stays visible (Dropdown.ct.tsx:185 + downstream :236 focus-return). Clicking outside should close the menu so both tests pass.
intake_classifications.minimal_fix: Make the outside-click actually dismiss the menu in the CT environment — fix at the layer the root cause lives (likely the test's click target/dispatch or CT mount), not Radix internals.

intake_classifications.statement: Likely a CT-environment viewport/pointer-coordinate issue or a Radix DismissableLayer interaction quirk in the Playwright CT harness; not necessarily a production defect.
